ruleTitle: Use the publish/ Scripts Instead of Raw sui client publish
description: publishes directly from the package directory instead of using the repo publish workflow

ruleTitle: Use the publish/ Scripts Instead of Raw sui client publish
description: uses the publish workspace script for the standard deploy flow

code:
# publish/.env
SUI_NETWORK=testnet
SUI_FULLNODE_URL=https://fullnode.testnet.sui.io
ADMIN_ADDRESS=0xabc
MOVE_PACKAGE_PATH=../move/my_package

cd publish && pnpm run deploy
description: deploy mode is missing the signing key that the direct publish flow requires

code:
# publish/.env
SUI_NETWORK=testnet
SUI_FULLNODE_URL=https://fullnode.testnet.sui.io
ADMIN_SECRET_KEY=<base64-secret>
MOVE_PACKAGE_PATH=../move/my_package

cd publish && pnpm run deploy
description: deploy mode provides the direct signer secret key

code:
# publish/.env
SUI_NETWORK=testnet
SUI_FULLNODE_URL=https://fullnode.testnet.sui.io
ADMIN_SECRET_KEY=<base64-secret>
MOVE_PACKAGE_PATH=../move/my_package

cd publish && pnpm run deploy-bytes
description: deploy-bytes mode uses the wrong signing input and omits the future signer address

code:
# publish/.env
SUI_NETWORK=testnet
SUI_FULLNODE_URL=https://fullnode.testnet.sui.io
ADMIN_ADDRESS=0xabc
MOVE_PACKAGE_PATH=../move/my_package

cd publish && pnpm run deploy-bytes
description: deploy-bytes mode uses the future signer address instead of a local secret key

ruleTitle: Treat publish/data as Output, Not Source
description: tries to commit generated output and a secret env file

ruleTitle: Treat publish/data as Output, Not Source
code:
# publish/data is generated output.
# Read the package ID from publish/data/publish.json, then copy only the needed NEXT_PUBLIC_*_PACKAGE_ID value into dapp/.env.example and dapp/src/config/clientConfig.ts.
description: generated publish output is consumed manually and not committed

ruleTitle: Use publish ENV Instead of dapp clientConfig
description: publish code imports the dapp client-only config module

ruleTitle: Use publish ENV Instead of dapp clientConfig
description: publish code reads from the publish-side env module
